overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European-style town with timber-framed buildings and cobblestone streets. The character navigates from a canal-side path through a town square and into a bustling market area, passing various NPCs and architectural landmarks.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side walkway with timber-framed merchant buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the canal path following an NPC in yellow clothing

notable_agents.action: man in yellow tunic walking ahead of Geralt along the path

entered.detail: multi-story medieval building with white plaster and dark wooden beams
narrow water canal running alongside the cobblestone path
wooden scaffolding and planks along the water edge
tall stone tower visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a cobblestone path beside a canal, passing timber-framed medieval buildings. The scene is set in the morning light with sparse pedestrian traffic, following an NPC in yellow clothing toward a distant stone tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with central well and open plaza

events.description: crossing small wooden bridge over canal into open town square

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the bridge and entering the town square, navigating around pedestrians

entered.detail: circular stone well with wooden roof structure in the center of the square

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a wooden bridge into a wider town square featuring a central stone well. The crowd density increases with scattered pedestrians moving in various directions, and the architecture shifts to surround the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between stone and timber buildings leading to city gate

events.description: entering shadowed narrow passage between tall buildings
approaching large stone archway gate with wooden portcullis

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the narrow street toward the stone gate, passing seated NPCs and merchants

entered.detail: large stone gate with rounded arch and heavy wooden beams
rough stone building wall with small arched windows

segments.scene_description: The scene narrows into an enclosed alley with stone walls and timber buildings blocking most of the sky. Geralt walks toward a prominent stone archway gate, with lighting becoming more diffused and shadows deepening.

scene_state.functional_zone: bustling market square with blacksmith forge and merchant stalls

events.description: passing through archway into open market area with visible forge fire
passing guards in red and white striped uniforms standing at the gate exit

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the market square past guards and merchants, navigating around wooden carts and stalls

notable_agents.action: guard in red and white striped uniform holding a polearm standing at the gate

entered.detail: stone forge with bright orange fire glowing inside and chimney above
wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the cobblestones
wooden merchant stall with canvas awning displaying goods

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges through the stone archway into a bustling market square. A blacksmith forge burns brightly on the right, while wooden carts and market stalls fill the area. Guards in distinctive red and white striped uniforms stand watch near the gate as pedestrians navigate the crowded space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet canal-side path into a bustling, open town square. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone route lined with timber-framed medieval buildings in the soft morning light, following an NPC in yellow clothing toward a distant stone tower. As the path progresses, the camera moves across a wooden bridge, transitioning from the narrow corridor of the waterfront to a wider urban space. The scene then opens into a central plaza featuring a stone well, where the architecture shifts to surround the open area and the crowd density increases with pedestrians moving in various directions.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, shadowed alleyway into the vibrant openness of a bustling market square. It begins within a narrow passage enclosed by stone walls and timber buildings that block out most of the sky, as the camera follows Geralt toward a prominent stone archway. As he passes through the gate, the diffused lighting and deep shadows suddenly give way to the bright, open atmosphere of the town center. The scene then expands to reveal a lively hub where a blacksmith's forge burns brightly on the right and wooden carts and market stalls fill the space. Finally, the view opens fully to show guards in red and white striped uniforms standing watch over the crowd of pedestrians navigating the square.
